title: Brigada Eskwela
description: School maintenance, preparation, and stakeholder partnership activities before the opening of classes.

title: Enrollment Period
description: Official school enrollment period for incoming and returning learners.

title: Opening of School Year 2026-2027
description: Official opening of School Year 2026-2027 under the DepEd three-term school calendar.

title: Opening Block
description: Beginning-of-school-year activities such as orientation, health-related activities, class organization, and school opening routines.

title: Start of Regular Classes
description: Start of regular instructional activities after the opening block and weekend/holiday interval.

title: Term 1
description: First academic term of School Year 2026-2027.

title: Term 1: First Teacher-Made Summative Test
description: Target schedule for the first teacher-made summative test for Term 1. Final implementation shall follow school-level instructions.

title: Term 1: Second Teacher-Made Summative Test
description: Target schedule for the second teacher-made summative test for Term 1. Final implementation shall follow school-level instructions.

title: Term 1 Examination
description: Target schedule for Term 1 examination. Final schedule shall follow official school memorandum.

title: Start of National Teachers' Month
description: Opening of the National Teachers' Month celebration.

title: Term 1 End-of-Term Block
description: End-of-term period for assessment-related activities, grading, school activities, INSET, and report card distribution.

title: PTA Meeting and Distribution of Report Cards
description: Target schedule for PTA meeting and distribution of Term 1 report cards. Final schedule shall be confirmed by the school.

title: INSET
description: In-Service Training period within the Term 1 end-of-term block.

title: Learners' Wellness Break
description: Guided wellness and asynchronous learning period for learners under the three-term calendar.

title: Teachers' Wellness Break
description: Wellness break for teachers following the INSET period.

title: End of Term 1
description: Official end of Term 1.

title: Term 2
description: Second academic term of School Year 2026-2027.

title: Start of Term 2
description: Official start of Term 2.

title: World Teachers' Day and Culmination of National Teachers' Month
description: Culminating activity for National Teachers' Month and observance of World Teachers' Day.

title: National Achievement Test for Grade 10
description: Target schedule for the National Achievement Test for Grade 10. Final implementation shall follow official DepEd and school advisories.

title: Term 2: First Teacher-Made Summative Test
description: Target schedule for the first teacher-made summative test for Term 2.

title: Term 2: Second Teacher-Made Summative Test
description: Target schedule for the second teacher-made summative test for Term 2.

title: All Saints' Day
description: Special non-working holiday.

title: All Souls' Day
description: Special non-working holiday.

title: Philippine Educational Placement Test
description: Target schedule for PEPT. Implementation shall follow official DepEd advisories.

title: Araw ng Pagbasa
description: Reading-related observance supporting literacy development.

title: Bonifacio Day
description: Regular holiday.

title: Term 2 Examination
description: Target schedule for Term 2 examination. Final schedule shall follow official school memorandum.

title: Term 2 End-of-Term Block
description: End-of-term period for assessment-related activities, grading, school activities, INSET, and report card distribution.

title: Feast of the Immaculate Conception of Mary
description: Special non-working holiday.

title: PTA Meeting and Distribution of Report Cards
description: Target schedule for PTA meeting and distribution of Term 2 report cards. Final schedule shall be confirmed by the school.

title: Year-End Activity
description: Target schedule for school year-end activity. Final conduct shall follow school memorandum.

title: INSET and Learners' Wellness Break
description: INSET for teachers and wellness/asynchronous learning period for learners within the Term 2 end-of-term block.

title: End of Term 2
description: Official end of Term 2.

title: Year-End Break
description: Year-end break and wellness interval for learners and teachers.

title: Term 3
description: Third academic term of School Year 2026-2027.

title: Start of Term 3
description: Official start of Term 3.

title: Term 3: First Teacher-Made Summative Test
description: Target schedule for the first teacher-made summative test for Term 3.

title: Start of Early Registration
audience: Incoming Grade 7, Grade 11, OSCYA, Transferees, and Parents
description: Target start of early registration for incoming learners and transferees. Final implementation shall follow DepEd and school advisories.

title: National Achievement Test for Grade 12
description: Target schedule for the National Achievement Test for Grade 12. Final implementation shall follow official DepEd and school advisories.

title: Term 3: Second Teacher-Made Summative Test
description: Target schedule for the second teacher-made summative test for Term 3.

title: End of Early Registration
audience: Incoming Grade 7, Grade 11, OSCYA, Transferees, and Parents
description: Target end of early registration for incoming learners and transferees. Final implementation shall follow DepEd and school advisories.

title: Term 3 Examination for Moving-Up and Graduating Learners
description: Target schedule for Term 3 examination for moving-up and graduating learners. Final schedule shall follow official school memorandum.

title: Term 3 Examination for Other Grade Levels
description: Target schedule for Term 3 examination for other grade levels. Final schedule shall follow official school memorandum.

title: Announcement of Academic Excellence Awardees
description: Target date for the announcement of academic excellence awardees for moving-up and graduating learners.

title: Term 3 End-of-Term Block
description: End-of-term period for final school activities, grading, INSET, report card distribution, and end-of-school-year preparations.

title: INSET
description: Target INSET schedule within the Term 3 end-of-term block. Final schedule shall follow official school memorandum.

title: End-of-School-Year Rites
description: Target schedule for moving-up and graduation ceremonies. Final schedule shall follow DepEd and school memoranda.

title: PTA Meeting and Distribution of Report Cards
description: Target schedule for PTA meeting and distribution of final report cards. Final schedule shall be confirmed by the school.

title: End of School Year 2026-2027
description: Official end of School Year 2026-2027 under the DepEd three-term school calendar.

title: The Day of Valor
description: Regular holiday.

title: Start of Teachers' EOSY Break
description: Start of the 30-day teachers' end-of-school-year break, subject to DepEd and school-level guidance.

title: National Schools Press Conference
audience: Campus Journalists, Coaches, and Concerned Personnel
description: Target schedule for the National Schools Press Conference. Participation shall follow official qualification, invitation, and DepEd issuance.
